# Nathaniel Production House

> Professional recording studio and music production house in Bangalore, India. Full-service recording, mixing, mastering, arrangement, and music education resources.

## About

Nathaniel Production House is a fully digital recording facility affiliated with Nathaniel School of Music, based in Bangalore, India. With 15+ years of experience and 500+ students trained, we offer comprehensive music production services and educational resources.

## Locations

- Langford Town, Bangalore 560025, Karnataka, India
- Sahakar Nagar, Bangalore 560092, Karnataka, India

## Contact

- Phone: +91 77604 56847
- Email: music@nathanielschool.com
- WhatsApp: +91 77604 56847
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM

## Studio Services

- **Recording**: Multi-track recording for any instrument with professional equipment
- **Editing**: Time and pitch correction using industry-standard tools
- **Mixing**: Expertise across Country, Rock, Metal, Blues, Folk, Electronic, and more
- **Mastering**: CD-ready, streaming-ready output in all formats
- **Songwriting & Production**: Vocal harmony, synth programming, sound design, orchestration
- **Video & Artwork**: Professional video recording/editing and album cover design

## Session Musicians Available

Voice Over, Piano/Keyboard, Orchestration, Arrangement, Electric/Acoustic Bass, Acoustic/Nylon/Electric Guitar, Indian & Western Flute, Percussion, Carnatic/Hindustani/Western Vocals, Choir, Trumpet, Melodica

## Professional Equipment

- DAW: Industry-standard Digital Audio Workstations
- Interfaces: Focusrite, Mbox 3 Pro
- Monitors: M-Audio BX 8 Deluxe
- Microphones: Shure (Beta 52A, SM 57, SM 81), Rode NT5, Blue (Bluebird, Baby Bottle), SE Electronics
- Headphones: EX-29, HD 380 Pro, AKG K 240 MK II
- Virtual Instruments: Native Instruments Komplete 8, IK Multimedia, Pianoteq, Steven Slate Drums

## Free Educational Resources

### Instrument Buying Guides
Comprehensive guides for purchasing pianos, keyboards, guitars, and accessories at every budget level.

### Piano Guide
Detailed comparison of digital pianos including Yamaha CK-88 vs Roland RD-88, setup guides, and recommendations by price tier.

### OBS & Zoom Setup Guide
Complete tutorial for setting up professional online music lessons using OBS Studio and Zoom, with optimal audio/video settings.

### MIDI Piano Visualizer
Free web-based tool featuring real-time chord detection, staff notation, 40+ scale practice modes, and multiple visualization modes (Standard, Fun, Teacher).

## Gear Marketplace
Community marketplace for buying and selling used musical instruments with price comparisons across Amazon, Bajaao, and SoundGlitz.

## Affiliate Partners
Discounted deals on music software (Pianoteq, Slate Digital, Native Instruments, Waves, iZotope, Reaper) and hardware (Focusrite, Audio-Technica, PreSonus).

## Notable Clients

- Lagori (Folk Rock)
- Bhoomi (Rock)
- Parvaaz (Psychedelic Rock Blues)
- Allegro Fudge (Acoustic Rock)
- Jason Zac Band (Instrumental)
- Samuel Deepak Victor (Christian Music)
